evals.expected_output: A technical design doc (01-domain-core-design.md) with all required sections and an implementation plan (01-domain-core-plan.md) with a numbered checkbox task list where dependent tasks declare 'Depends on: Task N' inline.

assertions.name: design-file-exists
assertions.text: The outputs directory contains a file named 01-domain-core-design.md

assertions.name: plan-file-exists
assertions.text: The outputs directory contains a file named 01-domain-core-plan.md

assertions.name: design-has-all-sections
assertions.text: The design doc contains all 8 required section headers: Goals, Non-goals, Architecture Overview, Key Types, Data Flow, Error Handling, Testing Approach, Open Questions

assertions.name: design-references-epic
assertions.text: The design doc references or links to the source epic file (docs/epics/01-domain-core.md)

assertions.name: plan-has-checkbox-tasks
assertions.text: The plan contains at least 3 numbered checkbox tasks matching the pattern '- [ ] **Task N:'

assertions.name: plan-has-depends-on
assertions.text: At least one task in the plan declares an inline 'Depends on:' dependency

assertions.name: plan-references-design
assertions.text: The plan references or links to the design document (01-domain-core-design.md)
